visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) In a brightly lit indoor living room with a minimalist aesthetic, a man with brown hair wearing a plain white t-shirt and blue shorts sits on a grey fabric couch next to a woman with long dark hair in a black top. He gestures emphatically toward his shirt with an annoyed facial expression while she looks on with a calm smile. (2) The scene shifts to a dining area where the man, now in a blue patterned denim button-down shirt, points aggressively at a series of colorful Swiss roll cakes on a white table. The woman sits across from him, holding a fork and eating a piece of cake. The background features simple home decor and soft indoor lighting. (3) Back in the living room area, the man stands holding a silver mop handle, gesturing wildly toward the woman who is reclined on the couch looking at her smartphone. Yellow and white text captions appear at the bottom of the screen to indicate dialogue transitions. (4) The final setting is a dense walk-in closet or retail space with racks of colorful hanging clothes. The woman holds up various garments for inspection while the man stands nearby, initially looking at his phone before engaging in an animated argument with wide-eyed expressions and finger-pointing gestures.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: POV：男人結婚後的轉變. [Subtitle]: 怎樣啦. (2) [Subtitle]: 小姐 這位太太. (3) [Subtitle]: 你有看到 我是白衣服 ^_^ 你那個妝是很難洗的哦 不要以為不是你在洗衣服 就可以這樣靠哦 靠什麼靠 怕髒做一件給你啊. (4) [Variety]: 囂張喔啦. (5) [Subtitle]: 你點這麼多是怎樣啊 吃的完是不是啊 都想吃啊 每一次都 這個吃一口 這個吃一口 那剩下還不都我吃 那吃完怎麼樣 變胖在那邊嫌 變胖在那邊嫌. (6) [Slogan]: 借問一下. [Subtitle]: 借問一下. [Variety]: CHILL. [Subtitle]: 不會幫我做家事是不是啊 這你的工作嘛 我的工作 家事是自己的 不然這是誰的家 上班很累耶 你要上班我不用上班 你賺錢我不用賺錢 我沒有在工作嗎 你賺的多我賺的多?? (7) [Variety]: (無法反駁). (8) [Subtitle]: 沒開餒. [Variety]: 吼 惡龍咆哮. [Subtitle]: 不是叫你先看好Google營業時間 它有沒有開 我想說來了就有位置啊 來了就有位置啊 要坐這裡484 都要吃啊 一直催催催 叫人家出門吃飯 就沒開就沒開嘛 也不會先打電話問一下 我以為有開 就沒開啊. (9) [Subtitle]: 這件好看嗎 還可以 那這件哩 還不錯還不錯 吼你都沒在看 我在看啊 你沒有發現我回答的不一樣嗎 男人老公學著點 回答都要不一樣 你每件都好看會被罵哦 我就講不一樣了還要被罵 我後悔跟你結婚啊 吼 講出來了喔 你有錄到喔 我跟你講 你現在離婚財產是一人一半喔 誰比較划算還不知道 ^_^ 你錄到了收工 收工.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One man and one woman are consistently featured in each sketch scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The man has short brown hair and wears a white t-shirt and denim shirt. The woman has long dark hair and wears black and white casual clothing.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video alternates between a domestic living room with a grey sofa, a dining area with colorful cakes, and a walk-in closet filled with apparel.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio sequence opens with a sharp, synthesized 'Whoosh' transition sound effect followed by a high-tempo, jaunty electronic BGM. A male voice enters immediately with high intensity and high arousal, speaking in an exaggerated, complaining tone about clothing and makeup with rapid speech rate. (2) A subsequent stinger sound effect triggers a new phase where a female voice responds with a playful, teasing tone and moderate pitch variability. The BGM remains steady in the background with a prominent rhythmic beat, while the male voice maintains a strained, comedic shouting delivery throughout the dialogue interplay. (3) A loud, stylized 'Dragon Roar' SFX punctuates the conversation as the man yells about chores and housework. The acoustic environment is very dry and clean, suggesting a studio-controlled recording. Both voices show high spectral energy in the mid-high frequency range, indicating an animated, argumentative performance style. (4) The final audio phase features rapid hard cuts between short vocal outbursts and concluding cartoonish SFX. The music swells briefly before a final beat-drop effect as the male voice delivers a humorous closing remark regarding financial assets, ending with a high-pitched stinger that signals the end of the take.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Scene 1 (The Shirt) -> Scene 2 (The Food) -> Scene 3 (The Chores) -> Scene 4 (The Clothes) -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video is a comedic sketch designed to entertain by portraying a series of exaggerated and humorous arguments between a married couple, specifically highlighting the man's perceived behavioral changes after marriage.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: No specific products are framed as a focus of promotion beyond general lifestyle props.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes rapid-fire editing and high-arousal vocal performances typical of social media trending comedy skits.
